pr_title: Add lever_classification field, fix haiku config, adaptive retry loop
pr_description: Add `lever_classification` field — a brief phrase combining category and decision axis (e.g. "governance — who oversees the review process"). Placed last in schema so llama3.1 fills important fields first (ollama generates JSON sequentially) Fix haiku `max_tokens` from 16000 to 8192 (actual API cap), preventing JSON truncation on large plans Relax `review_lever` minimum from 50 to 10 chars — the enrich step adds detail downstream Replace fixed 3-call loop with adaptive retry: keeps calling the LLM until 15 unique levers are accumulated (max 5 calls), fixing cases where validation failures discard entire batches leaving as few as 6 levers Implements proposals 1+2 from `docs/proposals/119-lever-pipeline-impl.md` (section 3.1).
